# Chapter 16: Post-mortem as practice  (~80 pp)
- 16.1 The post-mortem as engineering practice (12) · 16.2 Blameless post-mortems (12) · 16.3 The five-whys and its critics (10) · 16.4 STAMP and other systemic methods (12) · 16.5 Writing a post-mortem document (12) · 16.6 The post-mortem habit at organisational scale (12) · 16.7 Closing: handing the reader to Volume XI (10)

**Archetype**: ethics, all archetypes. **Project**: write a post-mortem of one project the reader has done in this book that did not work as expected. **Exercises**: 10.
